about.label: About me
about.p1: I combine technical depth with organisational leadership — equally at home in a Kubernetes cluster and a board meeting.
about.p2: Currently: BSc Software Systems at UZH, SoPra FS26 (Karaokee), homelab infrastructure with Ansible + k3s, club management tool for RCRJ.

cta.togsub: I welcome interesting projects — from infrastructure to fullstack.
